quote: I was paying $1,200/mo on Angi and getting maybe 3 real leads. GeoLocally built me a page that ranks near the top in my city — and a customer told me they found me through ChatGPT. That had never happened before.
name: Mike R.

quote: I didn’t even have a website before. They built my page, made the video, and I was live in 4 days. Patients keep saying they ‘found us online and loved the video’ before they booked.
name: Dr. Lena K.

quote: The video alone brought in new customers the first week we posted it on Facebook and Instagram. It finally feels like our business looks as good online as it does in person.
name: Jason T.
